_documentation.purpose: Central defaults for request-process timeouts that can cut a model generation, stream, QA phase, Gran Sabio phase, Long Text phase, SDK wait, or MCP wait.
_documentation.design_policy: Defaults are deliberately high because this engine can run against very different AI backends: fast hosted APIs, slow OpenRouter or open-source models, local Ollama/GPU/CPU models, reasoning/thinking models, and long QA or Long Text workflows.
_documentation.user_control: Operators can override these values with request_timeouts.json or environment variables. API, SDK, sidecar, and MCP callers can override them per request with timeout_seconds or the timeouts object. Per-request values may be shorter or longer than these defaults.
_documentation.model_recommendations: Model catalog reasoning/thinking timeout estimates are guidance and observability only. They do not override the configured or per-request hard timeout because users may intentionally want shorter or longer deadlines.
_documentation.connection_timeouts: Low-level socket connect, health-check, model-sync, keepalive, shutdown, and admin/debug timeouts are intentionally separate from this file unless explicitly listed as client connection fields.
